completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part monorepo with 3 parts: flutter_app (mobile), server (backend), web_landing (web)
Found 95+ existing docs across docs/, _bmad-output/, root. Plus CI workflows, test design docs.
Tech stack: Flutter 3.32 + Fastify 5 + PostgreSQL 16 + Socket.IO 4 + Firebase + k6

Deep scan: read critical directories. Server: 21 endpoints, 50+ socket events, 36 services, 8 DJ states, 4 repos, bot system (2 files), integration/E2E/concurrency tests (6 files), k6 perf tests (2 files). Flutter: 6 screens, 8 providers, 43 widgets, 72 tests.
Source tree updated with bots/, k6/, tests/integration/, tests/e2e/, tests/concurrency/, tests/helpers/, flutter-ci.yml
Dev guide updated with bot commands, k6 commands, integration test infrastructure, Flutter CI details
Architecture docs updated: server testing strategy (4 test levels, bot system, k6), Flutter testing (72 tests, CI)
Supporting docs updated: project-overview (CI/CD + bot system), project-parts.json (test counts)
Index updated: date, Flutter CI link, test docs links, bot quick start step
Validation complete, no incomplete docs detected
